goals: Store a preference about their preferred writing style and story approach
Search for stored memories to verify the preference was saved correctly
Add additional memories about creative preferences and story themes
List all stored memories to review the complete set of preferences

memories.text: User prefers entertainment-focused stories without moral messages
User enjoys sci-fi with complex plot twists

user_agent_config.personality: Creative and entertainment-focused, values engaging storytelling over didactic messaging. Prefers direct communication and concise exchanges.
user_agent_config.knowledge_boundary: Understands creative writing concepts and story preferences but does not know the internal tool names or APIs for memory management.

end_condition: The user has stored their writing preferences and verified that all memories are correctly saved in the system.
